channel.title: AWS on Level Up Your Code | Web & App Development Tutorials
channel.description: Recent content in AWS on Level Up Your Code | Web & App Development Tutorials

item.title: Best Cloud Certifications in 2026 That Are Actually Worth Getting
item.description:
Cloud certifications are big business. AWS, Azure, and Google will gladly take your money for exam vouchers — but not all of those certs are going to move the needle for your career.

Some certs genuinely open doors. Others just sit on your LinkedIn collecting dust. I’ve looked at job postings, talked to people who hire for cloud roles, and checked salary data to figure out which ones are actually worth the effort in 2026.

item.title: How to Upload Files to AWS S3 in Go Complete Guide with SDK v2
item.description:
If you’ve built any real application, you know file storage becomes a problem fast. User avatars, document uploads, video files - they pile up quickly, and you need somewhere reliable to put them. That’s where AWS S3 comes in. It’s like having unlimited storage that you only pay for what you use, and it integrates beautifully with Go.

AWS recently rewrote their entire Go SDK with v2, and honestly, it’s a massive improvement. Cleaner APIs, better error handling, proper context support - everything you’d want in a modern Go library. If you’re starting fresh or thinking about upgrading from v1, this guide has you covered.
